disclosure_label: Northset contributed this fix and ran its declared checks. Contributor self-run. Not maintainer verification.

repo_policy_snapshot.ai_policy_summary: No CLA or DCO required (MIT; contributions via PR). No explicit AI-contribution policy found (no AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, or GEMINI.md; CONTRIBUTING checked 2026-07-12). CONTRIBUTING requires updating Jest snapshots and adding a changelog_unreleased entry. CI gates: yarn test (Jest, multiple Node versions), yarn lint (ESLint, TypeScript typecheck, prettier self-check, changelog lint).

limitations: Contributor self-run record of Northset's own contribution; not the maintainer's verification.

The declared network-off check runs Prettier's full Markdown Jest suite (tests/format/markdown, 1476 tests including the new escaped-entity-semicolon regression fixture) on Node 22 via the repository's vendored Yarn, after a disclosed online phase-A install. It does not run the full repository test/lint matrix; upstream CI additionally runs multiple Node versions, ESLint, TypeScript typecheck, changelog lint, and production/browser tests.
